title: Polycule Vanilla
description: Simple Fabric server with optimizations and QOL features. Keeping it vanilla.
body:
This vanilla modpack using Fabric contains some essentials I'd recommend for both server and client side. I've primarily constructed this modpack to play on my server for our discord.</br>
</br>
Mods: </br>
Sodium / Lithium - Optimizations server / client sided</br>
Simple Voice Chat - simple proximity voice chat</br>
Sleep - Requires only certain amount of players to sleep</br>
ViaFabric - Any version minecraft can join (as long as the mods are the same)</br>
Iris Shaders - Shaders</br>
EmoteCraft - Custom emotes</br>
AppleSkin - HUD improvements</br>
